name: cctop
description: Live top-style monitor for Claude Code sessions

scripts.build: mkdir -p bin && bun build cctop.ts --compile --outfile bin/cctop && rm -f .*.bun-build
scripts.install-bin: bun run build && mkdir -p "${PREFIX:-$HOME/.local}/bin" && install -m 0755 bin/cctop "${PREFIX:-$HOME/.local}/bin/cctop"
